nasb.text: you also have done more evil than all who were before you, and have gone and made for yourself other gods and molten images to provoke Me to anger, and have cast Me behind your back—

esv.text: but you have done evil above all who were before you and have gone and made for yourself other gods and metal images, provoking me to anger, and have cast me behind your back,

cnv.text: 你反倒行惡，比那些在你以前的更壞；又去為自己製造了別的神和鑄造偶像惹我發怒，把我丟在背後。

ccb.text: 反而比前人行恶更甚，为自己设立其他神明，铸造神像，惹我发怒，把我抛在脑后。
